perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a black outfit holding a large cake box inside a Costco warehouse. She displays the 'Strawberry Pistachio Cake' to the camera with an excited expression. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the cake, emphasizing the large strawberries on top. (3) The setting shifts to a brightly lit indoor room where two women (one in black, one in white with a navy beret) sit at a table. (4) One woman slices the cake, revealing layers of pistachio mousse, sponge, and strawberry jam. (5) They taste the cake and provide feedback using hand gestures and facial expressions, alternating between approval and critical analysis of the texture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks excitedly about finding a new cake at Costco. (2) Ambient warehouse noise is subtly heard in the first half, followed by a cleaner, studio-like audio quality in the second half. (3) Sound effects like 'sparkle' and 'ding' noises are used to emphasize text overlays. (4) Two female voices engage in a dialogue, discussing the price (499 NTD) and the specific flavors of the ingredients.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '請問誰生日了嗎?' (Is it someone's birthday?) - Hooking the audience. (2) Decorative Text: '大家都是新生' (We are all newborns) - Humorous context for the cake purchase. (3) Hook Text: '499元值得？草莓開心果蛋糕' (Worth 499? Strawberry Pistachio Cake) - Identifying the product and price. (4) Effect Text: '口感也非常好' (Texture is also very good) - Highlighting a positive review point. (5) Rating Text: '我給7分 CP值很高' (I give it 7 points, high CP value) - Final verdict.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product Close-ups -> Tasting and Review at home -> Final Score

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black mesh top. The second woman wears a white ruffled blouse and a blue Kangol beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a commercial refrigerated aisle with metal shelving. The second is a cozy, modern indoor setting with white walls and warm lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Cross-section Reveal -> Sensory Review -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest consumer review of a new seasonal bakery item at Costco. The video aims to inform viewers about the product's value proposition, taste profile (mentioning the sweetness of the jam and density of the cake), and overall 'CP value' (cost-performance ratio).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Review of a specific branded product with clear price and location details.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density colorful text overlays and a numeric rating system at the end.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious foodies and Costco fans in Taiwan, using common social media tropes like size comparisons and layered food shots.
